question_html:
Identify the type of verb in the following sentences:

(a) He walks the horse.

(b) He has fallen ill.

(c) They elected him chairman.

(d) My mother makes me take the medicine.

(e) Honey tastes sweet.
solution_html:
(a) Transitive verb;

(b) Inchoative verb / linking verb / copulative verb;  

(c) Factitive verb;

(d) Causative verb;

(e) Stative verb/copular verb

 

Marks Distribution:

For identifying the correct type of verb; (0.5×5) = 2.5 marks.

question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the words given below:

Interpret, Mitigation, Negotiate, Observer, Persistent
solution_html:
Interpret – It’s important to interpret the data correctly before making decisions.

Mitigation – The government took steps for flood mitigation.

Negotiate – They had to negotiate terms before signing the contract.

Observer – The teacher was a careful observer of the student’s behavior.

Persistent – She is persistent in practicing the piano every day.

 

Marks Distribution:

For making five meaningful correct sentences; (0.5×5) = 2.5 marks.
